description: You are a bioimage analyst. Reconstruct a 4D Hyperstack from raw TIFF files located at `~/Fiji_Data/raw/BBBC005/` for a specific field of view (Well: A01, Cell Density: C1, Site: s1). The raw data contains 2 channels (w1=Nuclear, w2=Cell Body) and multiple focal planes. The resulting hyperstack should be organized in xyCZT order with 2 channels and 1 timeframe. Save the reconstructed hyperstack to `~/Fiji_Data/results/reconstructed_hyperstack.tif`.
